title: 10 best herbal creams for blocked nose
description: Yarrow creams helps with blocked nose because they contain the natural anti-inflammatory properties of yarrow, which helps to reduce swelling in the nasal passages. The cream's soothing properties also ease congestion by loosening mucus and promoting easy drainage, allowing for clearer breathing. Additionally, yarrow's natural antispasmodic properties help to relax the muscles in the nose, further relieving sinus pressure and discomfort caused by a blocked nose....
